user.title: Connect to your Suez Smart Solutions portal
user.description: Paste the URL of your portal's login page (or any page you're already logged in on). Country, branch and UI language are derived automatically.

data_description.username: The numeric customer ID printed on your water bill.
data_description.password: Stored encrypted in Home Assistant; never transmitted to third parties.

meters.title: Choose meters
meters.description: Select which meters you want to monitor in Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-enter password
reauth_confirm.description: Authentication for {username} at {base_url} has expired. Please re-enter the portal password.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the portal. Check your URL and connection.
error.invalid_url: The URL does not look like a Suez portal page.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See logs for details.
